data.title: Little Debbie introduces portable Boston Creme Pie with soft vanilla cookies, Boston creme flavor, and chocolate coating. Expanding lineup with new treat on Feb. 12, 2026 from Collegedale, Tenn.
data.description: In the town of Collegedale, Tennessee, on February 12, 2026, Little Debbie® introduced a delectable new treat that combines soft vanilla cookies, Boston creme flavor, and a decadent chocolate coating. This beloved brand, famous for transforming traditional desserts into accessible snacks, has added this irresistible creation to its product range.

data.title: Stock market plunges: Dow Jones drops 600 points, S&P 500 breaks key support. Trucking names tumble.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index saw a significant decrease as there was a market sell-off on Thursday. Companies like AppLovin and Cisco experienced a dive in their earnings. The Dow dropped by 600 points, and the S&P 500 broke through a key support level. Additionally, specific trucking companies faced a notable decline in their stock values. This data was not disclosed by the original source.

data.title: Levelpath reports 4X growth, major innovation, expansion, appoints new VP of Engineering.
data.description: Levelpath, a leading AI procurement company based in San Francisco, has experienced significant growth, with a reported increase of four times in their business. The company has also made substantial strides in product development and has expanded its organizational structure. Additionally, Levelpath has focused on enhancing its executive leadership team as part of its efforts to solidify its position in the market.
NY FED DESK TO CONDUCT ABOUT $13.4B IN REINVESTMENT PURCHASES AND AN ADDITIONAL $40B IN RESERVE MANAGEMENT PURCHASES BETWEEN FEB 13 AND MARCH 12.

data.title: Red River named to CRN's MSP 500 list for 2026 in Elite 150 category in North America, specializing in AI-driven solutions.
data.description: Red River, a technology firm based in Chantilly, Va., has been recognized by CRN® for its excellence in managed services. Specifically, they have been included in the Elite 150 category of the 2026 MSP 500 list by The Channel Company. This list features the top managed service providers in North America who offer crucial IT services to businesses and government entities. Red River specializes in AI-driven cybersecurity and IT infrastructure solutions for its government and enterprise clients. This prestigious recognition underscores their dedication to delivering high-quality technology solutions.
US Energy Secretary Wright: Russia's, China's and Iran's influence in Venezuela will wane.
AUSTRALIA NAMES BRUCE PRESTON AS PART-TIME MEMBER OF THE RBA MONETARY POLICY BOARD

data.title: CUPE concerned by federal probe proposing self-policing for airlines. Union represents 20,000 flight attendants at 11 airlines.
data.description: In Ottawa, the federal government's investigation into unpaid work has yielded disappointing outcomes. CUPE's Airline Division, representing 20,000 flight attendants across 11 airlines, is alarmed by the government's suggestion to allow self-regulation in the industry. Wesley Lesosky, President of the Airline Division of CUPE, expressed concern, noting that flight attendants are well aware of the prevalence of unpaid work. Airlines such as Air Canada and Porter have also been implicated in this issue.

data.title: US Signal further enhances OpenCloud services for secure desktops and workload mobility, offering flexibility and control. Based in Grand Rapids, Mich., the expansion aims to provide predictable economics to users.
data.description: US Signal, a digital infrastructure provider and Igneo Infrastructure Partners portfolio company, launched expanded OpenCloud services on Feb. 12, 2026, in Grand Rapids, Michigan. The services offer secure desktops and workload mobility, ensuring predictable economics and increased control. This move aims to provide enhanced digital solutions for businesses, with a focus on secure and efficient operations. US Signal is positioning itself as a key player in the digital infrastructure sector, catering to the growing demand for reliable and secure services.

Spot Vol Beta This gauge shows how sensitive S&P 500 option volatility is to moves in the index itself. A reading of 1.06 suggests volatility is reacting slightly more than normal to price changes, but not at extreme levels. Overall, options pricing appears fairly balanced

data.title: Ports America chooses GEP AI software to streamline procurement ops across the US; aims for intelligence and control.
data.description: A prominent marine terminal operator in the United States has implemented GEP's AI-powered procurement platform to enhance spend visibility and management within its extensive operations across the country. The deployment took place in Clark, New Jersey on February 12, 2026. GEP, known for offering cutting-edge procurement and supply chain solutions, was selected for this initiative.

data.title: Snowflake partners with U.S. Figure Skating to boost data and AI capabilities for athlete development. #AI #TheAIDataCloud
data.description: In Bozeman, Montana, Snowflake, the AI Data Cloud company, has partnered with U.S. Figure Skating to enhance the organization's data and AI capabilities in business operations, athlete performance insights, and long-term development of figure skating. This collaboration aims to leverage data for improved operations and athlete support. U.S. Figure Skating, the national governing body for the sport in the U.S., will benefit from Snowflake's expertise in this venture. The partnership signifies the growing significance of data in enhancing performance across all levels of the sport.

data.title: Calix launches HomeOfficeIQ on Calix Platform for service providers to enhance home network security and boost revenues during outages.
data.description: Today, Calix, Inc. released HomeOfficeIQ™, a new feature in SmartHome™ on the Calix Platform, aiming to enhance subscriber loyalty and boost revenue for service providers. This new addition includes cellular network failover managed through CommandIQ®, offering a solution for maintaining connectivity during unforeseen network outages. This launch provides households with the ability to manage their connectivity through an app, creating opportunities for service providers. Calix, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CALX.

data.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute experts Conner Brown and Zach Shapiro spoke at the UN on digital asset law.
data.description: In a noteworthy development, the Bitcoin Policy Institute (BPI) engaged in a significant meeting at the United Nations Headquarters in New York on Feb. 12, 2026. BPI representatives, Conner Brown and Zach Shapiro, took part in a momentous session at the UNCITRAL Colloquium on Digital Trade and Finance. The event, held by the United Nations, showcased expertise from the BPI on key issues related to digital trade and finance.

data.title: Fastly stock surges 88% on record Q4 revenue of $172.6 million, EPS doubling expectations, driven by rise in agentic AI.
data.description: Fastly Inc. (NYSE: FSLY) saw its shares skyrocket by over 80% following the release of its fourth-quarter results and bullish 2026 outlook. The company reported a record-breaking quarterly revenue of $172.6 million, representing a 23% increase from the previous year. Earnings per share also surpassed analysts' expectations, doubling forecasts. CEO Kip Compton hailed this as a pivotal moment for the edge cloud platform, referring to it as a significant "inflection point." Fastly's stock is on a sharp upward trajectory. The company's role as a leading player in facilitating agentic AI, which includes autonomous models and bots operating on the web independently, has been a key driver behind the investor excitement. Compton emphasized the growing significance of such traffic, highlighting a fundamental shift in the operations of the internet. This development underscores Fastly's growing prominence as a key enabler in the realm of autonomous AI.

data.title: Titomic Limited signs Space Act Agreement with NASA for testing and evaluation. Global leader in cold spray additive manufacturing.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, in Huntsville, Alabama, Titomic Limited (ASX: TTT), a prominent player in cold spray additive manufacturing through its Titomic Kinetic Fusion™ technology, revealed a significant development. The company has entered a Space Act Agreement with NASA for collaborative testing and evaluation purposes. This agreement marks a strategic move for Titomic Limited to advance its technology further through partnership with a leading space agency.

data.title: Noise-PR aids 350+ US real estate agents in boosting business by enhancing their brand visibility and positioning.
data.description: In London on February 12, 2026, Noise-PR, a boutique agency specializing in public relations and brand authority, has supported over 350 real estate agents throughout the United States. This assistance has enabled these agents to enhance their visibility and attract more inbound demand by strategically positioning them through trusted national publicity efforts.

data.title: Trax Ltd. divests Image Recognition business to Gemspring Capital, focusing on growth; strategically positioning for market expansion.
data.description: In Boston on February 12, 2026, Trax Ltd., a tech company known for its data-driven AI in retail and image recognition expertise, revealed the sale of its Image Recognition (IR) division to a Gemspring Capital affiliate. This move signifies a strategic shift in focus, emphasizing the importance of investing in other core areas within the company.

data.title: Sysco Teamsters in Chicago and Montana authorize strike as over 500 workers demand fair contract with 99.5% vote margin.
data.description: In a show of solidarity, a group of over 500 Sysco drivers and warehouse workers in Chicago and Montana, represented by five Teamsters locals, have overwhelmingly voted by a 99.5 percent margin to approve a strike. This decision comes amidst demands for a fair contract.
